title: Jpk's Apocalypse Shield
description: This pack aims to replace the in-game shield with this more apocalypse themed one to bring fun and immersive gameplay to your apocalypse modpacks!
body:
This pack was made to help make Apocalypse more immersed with a reenforced scrap shield that comes right out of the apocalypse ! 

 

(NOTE needs optifine or ETF)

(Shield in normal mode) 


(Shield in blocking mode)

 

(This texture pack was made for https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/apocalypse-remnants-of-earth ) Feel free to use with credit! and check out the modpack for the best time! :D
